name: Cheesy Macaroni and Broccoli
recipeIngredient: 1 large red bell pepper, diced small
1/2 cup real or imitation bacon bits
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly oil a large baking dish.
2. Wipe the baking dish with a paper towel to remove excess oil.
3. Combine all ingredients except milk in a large pan.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared baking dish.
5. Pour milk over everything.
6. Bake at 450°F for about 20 minutes, until bubbly and golden.
